posts.author: RRRRRR (Ryo Iwakura)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We have received a request from a customer to view the slide panel in the Gantt chart view.

What are you trying to achieve

I want to view the slide panel in the Gantt chart view to help customers proceed smoothly with development.
